task_completion.description: The Canvas calendar interface is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the Canvas LMS interface with the Calendar view active.

task_completion.description: The 'Final Exam Review Session' event is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event titled 'Final Exam Review Session' is visible on the calendar grid or in an event creation/details popup.

task_completion.description: The 'Final Exam Review Session' event has the correct time, location, description, and course calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details show a time of 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM, location 'Science Building Room 204', description containing 'comprehensive review' and 'practice problems', and it is assigned to the CHEM101 calendar.

task_completion.description: The 'Final Exam Review Session' event is scheduled 7 to 14 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the calendar view, 'Final Exam Review Session' is scheduled 7 to 14 days after the current date (today's date is typically highlighted).

task_completion.description: The 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' event is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event titled 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' is visible on the calendar grid or in an event creation/details popup.

task_completion.description: The 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' event has the correct time, location, description, and course calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details show a time of 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM, location 'Faculty Office 312', description containing 'one-on-one' and 'last chance', and it is assigned to the CHEM101 calendar.

task_completion.description: The 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' event is scheduled exactly one day before the review session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the calendar view, 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep' is scheduled exactly one day before the 'Final Exam Review Session' event.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the real Canvas web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is navigated to a Canvas LMS instance, not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the events were created via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Canvas calendar UI (clicking dates, filling forms), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the page wasn't faked using developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools are not open, and the UI looks like a standard Canvas calendar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating two events in Canvas for CHEM101. Event 1: 'Final Exam Review Session', 7-14 days from today, 6:00 PM-8:00 PM, location 'Science Building Room 204', description contains 'comprehensive review' and 'practice problems'. Event 2: 'Drop-in Office Hours - Final Prep', exactly one day before Event 1, 2:00 PM-3:00 PM, location 'Faculty Office 312', description contains 'one-on-one' and 'last chance'.
